headlines.title: U.S. and Iran to close deal within a day, Trump says, but Tehran yet to confirm
headlines.summary: An agreement would extend the ceasefire and pave the way for a longer truce, leaders said, though an Iranian official denied a deal will be signed Sunday.

headlines.title: Global HIV prevention declined drastically after Trump aid cuts, U.N. finds
headlines.summary: Cuts from the U.S. and others have hit hard, with the number of people receiving PrEP dropping by 38% from 2024 to 2025, according to data from 62 countries.

headlines.title: U.S. and Iran close to signing ceasefire deal, officials say
headlines.summary: After days of uncertainty and tit-for-tat military strikes, "text of the peace deal has been reached,” according to Pakistan's prime minister.

headlines.title: Pope Leo had to catch a ride from the king of Spain after plane’s engine failed
headlines.summary: The pope wrapped up a trip to Spain by borrowing a private jet from King Filipe VI after the Vatican's chartered plane, with the press corps on board, broke down.

headlines.title: China and Myanmar detain U.S. citizens in separate incidents, sparking alarm
headlines.summary: Despite no immediate evidence that they were connected, the detentions of two vocal commentators on Myanmar triggered alarm in the business and research communities.

headlines.title: America250 vs Freedom 250: What to know about the US’s 250th anniversary
headlines.summary: The celebrations to mark the US's 250th anniversary have been overshadowed by questions about Trump's influence.

headlines.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed today, Tehran disputes timing
headlines.summary: US and Iran appear close to signing the first stage of a peace deal, the two sides differ on when it will be signed.

headlines.title: Thousands rally in Rome, Italy for rival pro- and anti-migration marches
headlines.summary: Thousands of police deployed to keep the rallies apart as far-right 'remigration' initiative gains traction.

headlines.title: ‘A global rupture’: Carney calls for Canada-EU unity before G7 summit
headlines.summary: Canada's prime minister has warned that the 'rules-based' global order is 'breaking down' amid superpower dominance.

headlines.title: ‘Not in my name’: The Jewish diaspora fighting the consensus on Israel
headlines.summary: The Jewish diaspora say they reject Israel’s authority over their name amid Smotrich’s Israel Day parade appearance.

headlines.title: Police investigate theft of England equipment at World Cup, 2 people in custody
headlines.summary: Two people have been detained in connection with the theft of equipment from the England national team's vehicles during their move from a pre-training base in Florida to Kansas City, where they have their permanent World Cup base camp.

headlines.title: As Bay Area hosts World Cup, empty red seats are everywhere at Levi's Stadium
headlines.summary: On Friday, FIFA blamed the empty seats during the World Cup match between South Korea and the Czech Republic in Guadalajara on fans who watched from the concourses. Levi's Stadium staged the Super Bowl only four months ago.

headlines.title: A Lebanon town's grief in the aftermath of a deadly Israeli airstrike
headlines.summary: More than 3,700 people in Lebanon have died in the war between Israel and Hezbollah. In a village in southern Lebanon, one airstrike last month killed 14 people, including 10 women and children.

headlines.title: 4 things to know about the new sunscreen ingredient the FDA approved
headlines.summary: The Food and Drug Administration approved a new sunscreen ingredient in the U.S. for the first time in 20 years. It's been used for decades in Europe and Asia.

headlines.title: A plan to get lifesaving food to hungry kids was working well -- until it wasn't
headlines.summary: Through an innovative program, parents in Senegal had easy access to a therapeutic food that's a boon for malnourished kids. Now there are shortages. Health specialists say U.S. aid cuts are to blame.

headlines.title: China seeks greater imports from Europe
headlines.summary: China stands ready to import more from Germany and the rest of Europe, Ling Ji, vice-minister of commerce and deputy international trade representative of China, said on Thursday, emphasizing the complementary nature of China-Germany economic relations and the vast opportunities offered by the Chinese market.

headlines.title: Trump says US Iran close to deal, signing expected within days
headlines.summary: WASHINGTON -- US President Donald Trump said Thursday that the United States had "just made a great settlement of the war with Iran," with an agreement expected to be signed "over the next few days."

headlines.title: US farmers 'cautiously optimistic' on China trade
headlines.summary: During United States President Donald Trump's visit to Beijing last month, both sides reached a positive consensus on market access for certain agricultural products. The two parties agreed in principle to incorporate those products into a framework arrangement for reciprocal tariff reductions, and establish targets to expand agricultural trade.

headlines.title: Mideast tense as US, Iran trade fresh strikes
headlines.summary: The situation in the Middle East remained tense after the United States and Iran exchanged strikes for the second day, with Tehran announcing the complete closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Beijing mourns veteran Japanese statesman Yohei Kono
headlines.summary: China's top legislator Zhao Leji sent a message of condolence on Thursday to the family of Yohei Kono following his death, expressing hope that Kono's family would carry forward his legacy and play a positive role in helping bring China-Japan relations back on the right track.

headlines.title: IAF aircraft AN-32 crashes while landing in Assam's Jorhat
headlines.summary: An Indian Air Force (IAF) AN-32 transport aircraft crashed while landing in Assam's Jorhat on June 13, 2026, killing five personnel. Read the latest updates.

headlines.title: DRDO demonstrates advanced missile defence, anti-ship strike capabilities in three successful flight tests
headlines.summary: DRDO successfully tests advanced missile defense and anti-ship strike capabilities, enhancing India's strategic defense against diverse threats.

headlines.title: Will voice Global South’s aspirations in G7 summit, says PM Modi ahead of trip to France, Slovakia
headlines.summary: PM Modi's visit to France and Slovakia aims to amplify Global South aspirations and strengthen India's ties with Europe and the G7.

headlines.title: Police search Abhishek Banerjee's Kolkata residence for over four hours
headlines.summary: Police conduct a four-hour search at TMC's Abhishek Banerjee's Kolkata home, escalating political tensions in West Bengal.

headlines.title: Bangladesh Jamaat-e-Islami chief seeks clarification on High Commissioner-designate Dinesh Trivedi’s remarks
headlines.summary: Bangladesh Jamaat-e-Islami chief demands clarification on India's High Commissioner Dinesh Trivedi's remarks about India and Bangladesh unifying.

headlines.title: North Korea says 'denuclearisation' is a matter terminated irreversibly
headlines.summary: Reuters: North Korea says 'denuclearisation' is a matter terminated irreversibly.

headlines.title: US, India to tackle trade at G7 but deal not imminent, US officials say
headlines.summary: Reuters: US, India to tackle trade at G7 but deal not imminent, US officials say.

headlines.title: Orban re-elected as Fidesz party leader in Hungary despite election loss
headlines.summary: Reuters: Orban re-elected as Fidesz party leader in Hungary despite election loss.

headlines.title: Trump says Iran deal to be signed on Sunday
headlines.summary: Reuters: Trump says Iran deal to be signed on Sunday.

headlines.title: Protesters tear down Albanian development site fences, amid anger over coastal projects
headlines.summary: Reuters: Protesters tear down Albanian development site fences, amid anger over coastal projects.

hackerNews.title: Treating pancreatic tumours may have revealed cancer's master switch
hackerNews.summary: economist.com: Treating pancreatic tumours may have revealed cancer's master switch.

hackerNews.title: ReactOS (FOSS "Windows") achieves 3D-accelerated Half-Life on real hardware
hackerNews.summary: ReactOS, the open-source operating system working for binary compatibility with Microsoft Windows computer programs and drivers, has reached the milestone of being able to enjoy the classic game Half-Life running on this open-source platform.

hackerNews.title: Running DOS on Behringers DDX3216 with a DIY x86-Bios from Scratch
hackerNews.summary: In 1994 I got my first computer: an Intel i486 DX2-66 with 4 MB RAM and a 512MB harddisk. The software was IBMs OS/2 and Microsofts Windows 3.11. In the next four years I was upgrading this machine every few months with more RAM (up to 16MB), a CD-ROM-drive and a soundblaster card. So I learned upgrading this machine, installing new software and finally learned how to program new software using BASIC. But I never got in touch with the boot-process or the details of MS-DOS.

hackerNews.title: Amazon CEO's talks with U.S. officials triggered crackdown on Anthropic models
hackerNews.summary: wsj.com: Amazon CEO's talks with U.S. officials triggered crackdown on Anthropic models.

summarySections.title: News and markets
sentences: Global headlines: U.S. and Iran to close deal within a day, Trump says, but Tehran yet to confirm (An agreement would extend the ceasefire and pave the way for a longer truce, leaders said, though an Iranian official denied a deal will be signed Sunday); Global HIV prevention declined drastically after Trump aid cuts, U.N. finds (Cuts from the U.S. and others have hit hard, with the number of people receiving PrEP dropping by 38% from 2024 to 2025, according to data from 62 countries); and U.S. and Iran close to signing ceasefire deal, officials say (After days of uncertainty and tit-for-tat military strikes, "text of the peace deal has been reached,” according to Pakistan's prime minister).
Markets leaned higher, with 6 of 7 tracked indexes up; Nikkei 225 up 2.81% was the largest move.
Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes.
